ui_accessibility.prompt: A short, soft fantasy UI hover tick with a gentle high-frequency shimmer, under 250ms. Clean attack, no harsh transient.
A crisp, tactile primary UI click with subtle wood-and-metal texture in dark-fantasy style. Short and readable, under 300ms.
A positive confirmation chime with warm magical overtones and a quick upward motion. Rewarding but speech-safe.
A distinct two-tone assistive cue indicating text block completion for screen-reader users. Clear tonal separation, under 400ms.
A precise focus indicator cue for interactive elements. Fast onset and light timbre that remains audible over ambient beds.
A brief downward error tone with muted metallic texture to indicate invalid action. Negative but non-alarming.
A stronger forbidden cue with low thud and short dissonant accent. Communicates locked or prohibited action immediately.

narrative_system_cues.prompt: A rising cinematic cue with subtle choir and bright harmonic swell, signaling major momentum gain. About one second long.
A descending dark cue with low strings and soft bass impact to signal momentum loss. Emotional but concise.
A subtle ethereal chime followed by a low cinematic bass drop, indicating a major plot branch split in dark-fantasy style.
A compact ascending sparkle cue for stat increases. Magical, clean, and satisfying without masking narration.
A triumphant fantasy level-up flourish with layered chimes and brief orchestral lift. Celebratory, 1.5 to 2 seconds.
A neutral-positive quest update cue with parchment-like soft hit and a tonal chime. Informative and thematic, under one second.
